dependencies: Reliance on vendors and third parties for business, investment management, technology, operations, facilities management and other services
Dependence on mobile service providers, carriers, retailers, OEMs and cable operators for distribution
Reliance on third-party cloud service providers for key aspects of business operations
Dependence on nationwide network of over 900 repair and partner locations for mobile device repairs
risks: Failure to successfully manage vendors and other third parties could adversely affect business
Vendors and third parties face technology, operating, business and economic risks
Cybersecurity incidents involving vendors or third parties could compromise operations and data
Supply chain constraints affecting mobile device availability and value
Tariffs and global supply chain disruptions
Adverse foreign trade relationships and escalation of U.S.-China and China-Taiwan trade tensions

regulatory_risks: Extensive federal, state and international regulation and supervision in jurisdictions where business is conducted
Insurance holding company laws requiring prior approval for control acquisitions
State and territory insurance regulations on licensing, capital, dividends, underwriting, premium rates, policy forms, market conduct
Risk-based capital (RBC) standards and minimum solvency requirements
NAIC Real Property Lender-Placed Insurance Model Act adoption in several states
Dodd-Frank Act regulations on mortgage servicers and lender-placed insurance
Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) potential authority over insurance products
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) and U.K. Anti-Bribery Act compliance
Anti-corruption laws and regulations across operating jurisdictions
GDPR and comprehensive data protection laws in multiple countries
NAIC Insurance Data Security Model Law enacted in multiple states
SEC cybersecurity disclosure rules
NYDFS cybersecurity rule amendments
Artificial intelligence regulations including NAIC model bulletin and EU AI Act
Climate-related disclosure regulations including SEC rules and EU Corporate Sustainability Directive
California climate-related disclosure requirements
Pillar Two Model Rules implementing 15% minimum effective tax rate in multiple jurisdictions
Corporate Alternative Minimum Tax (CAMT) under Inflation Reduction Act
Changes in tax laws and regulations
State insurance regulators hiring third-party auditors for unclaimed property records
Potential federal regulation of insurance including optional federal charter proposals
ERISA requirements for employee benefit plans administration
Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act privacy requirements
International regulations on fair value and fair treatment for consumer products and services
U.S. and local customs and trade regulations for mobile device movement across borders
Health, safety, labor and environmental regulations impacting mobile supply chain operations
Antitrust and competition-related laws and regulations

sanction_risks: Imposition of sanctions, tariffs, trade barriers or protectionist laws
Adverse foreign trade relationships and escalation of U.S.-China and China-Taiwan trade tensions affecting mobile device value and availability
Sanctions compliance requirements under FCPA and international anti-corruption laws
